name: Iran
summary: Day 78 of Hormuz blockade. **TRUMP IMMEDIATELY REVERSED POST-SUMMIT** ('decimation to be continued' Truth Social + Hannity 'not patient' + Detroit News 'didn't ask China for favours') and on **Saturday May 16 sent Iran a NEW NUCLEAR PROPOSAL LETTER demanding full dismantling + halt all enrichment + end proxy support within 2-month compliance window** (CONFIRMED letter sent — Trump confirmed; CLAIMED contents — RedState May 15 + Wikipedia secondary; primary text not surfaced). The Thursday joint statement produced **ZERO operational follow-through** — no HEU-custodian framework, no Chinese security guarantees, no verification architecture. **Iran's diplomatic choreography has refined into a FIVE-PILLAR MULTI-TRACK POSTURE rather than the synchronised hardening of late April-early May**: (1) **FM Araghchi (Tasnim primary May 15)** told Tasnim that enrichment 'is currently not on the agenda of discussions or negotiations' but 'will be addressed in later stages' — cleanest tactical-defer framing of the cycle, positioning enrichment as a defer-to-later-phase item rather than an immediate concession; (2) **Khamenei advisor Ali Shamkhani publicly responded that Iran is ready to sign in exchange for quick removal of all financial sanctions** but criticised Trump's rhetoric — cleanest Iranian conditional-acceptance signal of the cycle, attached to the Supreme Leader's office rather than civilian government; (3) **Pezeshkian 'never bow'** continues; (4) **Artesh-Akraminia 'surprising options'** carries forward; (5) **IRGC drill closed Day 5/5 with 'all objectives achieved.'** Internally-consistent triangulation: maintain leverage, condition concessions on sanctions, defer the hardest item. **Iranian officials denied receiving any new US proposal and insisted Iran would not give up the right to enrich uranium** (Tasnim/Press TV). No Iranian state-media outlet has carried Trump's 'decimation' Truth Social post through Saturday morning IST — Iran is choosing not to amplify Trump's inflammatory rhetoric, preserving its own diplomatic-conditional framing intact. **IRAN ALLOWED 30+ CHINESE SHIPS TO TRANSIT HORMUZ since May 13 night under 'Iranian management protocols'** (REPORTED — Fars Iranian semi-official, citing IRGC-Navy senior official; Iran state TV; Xinhua; Al Jazeera; CBS; Defense Post; Newsweek). Operational confirmation that Iran is using selective transit as a diplomatic instrument rather than enforcing a comprehensive blockade — and the Aramco CEO Nasser benchmark of ~30 vessels/day vs 140 pre-war is now partially explained: a portion of the ~30/day is Iran-permitted Chinese transit, not non-Iranian commercial flow. Non-Iranian non-Chinese transit rate is therefore likely *lower* than the headline 30/day. **A5 RIAL BONBAST May 15 = 1,822,000 IRR/USD (+0.61% from May 14), REVERSING the three-day strengthening pattern yesterday's brief flagged on the Alanchand series**. The Bonbast and Alanchand series have diverged on May 15: Alanchand shows continued strengthening (-0.06% d/d), Bonbast shows reversal (+0.61% d/d). Architecture's trigger baseline is Bonbast free-market — directional read flips from 'gradually pricing summit-pause' to 'neutral-to-mildly-weakening pending operational outcome.' **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 9 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** — May 13 portrait of Mojtaba (not Mojtaba himself) was held at football send-off; the CNN April 21 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen' framing continues to hold structurally. **Hui Chuan + Haj Ali — no fresh UKMTO advisory through May 16 morning**; Iran has not commented on Hui Chuan; no attribution on Haj Ali; India MEA 'unacceptable' condemnation carries forward. Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~22-27% (HOLDS — Artesh + IRGC dual-track readiness signaling continues but no new kinetic action; missile fire rate -92% from peak); extended-economic-warfare ~50-55% (HOLDS — Hormuz physically constrained at ~30/day, Iran curbing output, selective-transit instrument now operational); negotiated-resolution ~20-25% (HOLDS — joint statement empty + Trump immediate reversal + new 2-month letter narrow the landing zone, but Shamkhani conditional acceptance and Araghchi defer-enrichment preserve channel). PRIOR (May 15): **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 2 PRODUCED JOINT STATEMENT THAT IRAN 'CAN NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON' AND STRAIT OF HORMUZ 'MUST REMAIN OPEN'** (CONFIRMED — ToI May 15 liveblog primary, CBS, CNN, China MFA readout, Al Jazeera). The China MFA readout records that 'China values Iran's pledge not to pursue nuclear weapons while affirming its legitimate right to the peaceful use of nuclear energy' — Iran's right-to-civilian-program escape valve preserved in language. **Iran has NOT welcomed the joint statement publicly** — neither Pezeshkian (civilian) nor any military Iranian official acknowledged. **IRANIAN ARMY (ARTESH) SPOKESPERSON BRIG. GEN. MOHAMMAD AKRAMINIA WARNED IN IRNA INTERVIEW OF 'SURPRISING OPTIONS' IF ADVERSARIES MAKE ANOTHER 'MISCALCULATION'** — saying any future aggression would take the conflict into areas 'the enemy has not anticipated' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC, IRNA primary). This is fresh kinetic-preparation rhetoric from a uniformed Artesh spokesperson, institutionally distinct from Pezeshkian's civilian 'never bow' framing and from IRGC drill signaling — coordinated kinetic-readiness messaging across BOTH Iranian military pillars exactly as the Trump-Xi joint statement was being issued. **IRGC 'MARTYRED COMMANDER / LABBAYK YA KHAMENEI' COMBAT EXERCISE CLOSED DAY 5/5 WITH HASSANZADEH STATEMENT THAT ALL OBJECTIVES ACHIEVED** (CONFIRMED — Mehr News + News.az + Islam Times + Pars Today). Drill's invocation of LATE Ali Khamenei (rather than supposedly-active Mojtaba) is the institutional tell — IRGC leaning on patriarch's legacy because new Supreme Leader's authority is constrained. Tasnim's parallel 'Anti-Heliborne War Game' was a counter-Special-Operations-insertion drill mapping directly to the kind of US ground-raid posture that would follow if Sledgehammer were ordered. **A5 RIAL THIRD CONSECUTIVE SESSION OF SLIGHT STRENGTHENING ON HAWALA/REMITTANCE SERIES**: 1,817,000 (May 13), 1,811,000 (May 14), 1,810,000 (May 15) — three consecutive sessions, -0.39% from May 12 close 1,842,000. The 2,000,000-trigger ETA continues to push out: at the new pace, linear extrapolation no longer reaches 2M before mid-June. Bonbast direct fetch returned no data this morning (page returned site structure without numerical data); tomorrow re-attempt or accept Alanchand as operational benchmark. Hawala/Remittance series = the channel exporters and importers use for trade settlement; Bonbast 'free market' = retail tourist/dollar-hoarding channel; series can diverge 20-50K. **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 8 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** — IRGC drill nomenclature leaning on Ali rather than Mojtaba is institutional pattern of regime functioning around an absent center. **A8 SAUDI MFA TACIT ACKNOWLEDGMENT LANGUAGE** — Senior Saudi foreign ministry official asked directly about covert strikes did NOT address the question, instead said: 'We reaffirm Saudi Arabia's consistent position advocating de-escalation, self-restraint and the reduction of tensions...'  Closest thing to tacit acknowledgment in any Saudi communication of the cycle — official did not deny Reuters/WSJ reporting. Iranian MFA 'did not respond to a request for comment' per Reuters. Reuters added timing detail: 'informal de-escalation took effect in the week before Washington and Tehran agreed to a ceasefire in their broader conflict on April 7' — Saudi-Iran de-escalation predated broader US-Iran ceasefire by ~one week, suggesting Saudi exit from kinetic exchange may have been leading edge of broader ceasefire architecture. **Iran has been notably silent through the joint-statement day; no kinetic retaliation; no formal welcoming of the joint statement; no rejection.** Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~20-25% (HOLDS — joint statement neutral, no de-escalation action by Iran, no escalation either; Artesh + IRGC dual-track readiness signaling continues but Iran missile fire rate -92% from peak); extended-economic-warfare ~50-55% (HOLDS — Hormuz physically closed per Aramco, Iran curbing output, IRGC drill complete); negotiated-resolution ~20-25% (UP modestly — China rhetorically aligned on nuclear-weapons line via joint statement, BUT 'peaceful use' language preserves Iranian civilian-program escape valve). PRIOR (May 14): Trump publicly opened HEU-via-China custodian door pre-summit; Vance softer; Pentagon Sledgehammer naming; 1-week clock closing today without strike order. Trump-Xi summit Day 1 in Beijing: Trump publicly opened HEU-via-China custodian door ('only Washington or Beijing can retrieve Iran's nuclear material if Tehran agrees to hand it over' — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary CONFIRMED RHETORIC). MATERIAL POLICY SIGNAL — contradicts pre-departure 'doesn't need Xi' line, substitutes China for Russia as proposed HEU custodian on Day 15 of 21 Russia-track window. Xi opened with 'partners rather than rivals' / 'Thucydides Trap' / wants 2026 'landmark year.' VP Vance May 13 publicly softer line: negotiators 'still making progress' despite 'unsatisfying responses' — first publicly-visible US-internal-administration tone divergence. Pentagon contingency-naming 'Operation Sledgehammer' (NBC primary May 12) = bureaucratic preparation for post-summit decision window May 15-20, NOT an order — also potential War Powers Act 60-day-clock-reset workaround. **A11 IRAN FM ARAGHCHI MET MODI IN DELHI MAY 14 AT BRICS-FM TABLE — SAME DAY TRUMP IN BEIJING (CONFIRMED — Iran Embassy New Delhi + ANI + Tribune India + Times of Israel liveblog). ARAGHCHI USED DELHI PLATFORM TO DIRECTLY THREATEN UAE** ('Iranian FM threatens UAE, claims Tehran knew of Netanyahu's visit to Abu Dhabi' — ToI May 14 liveblog primary CONFIRMED RHETORIC). India hosts Iran's FM threatening India's other Gulf strategic partner from Indian soil one day before Modi flies UAE first-leg of 5-nation tour — extraordinary diplomatic optics; India strategic-autonomy-as-multi-vector-channel operationally tested. **A12 IRGC LAUNCHED 5-DAY 'MARTYRED COMMANDER / LABBAYK YA KHAMENEI' COMBAT EXERCISE AROUND TEHRAN (May 12-onwards)** (CONFIRMED ACTION — Mehr News + Press TV + Tasnim + Islam Times + Pars Today + WION). Codename invokes the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father), NOT the supposedly-active new Supreme Leader = leaning on deceased's institutional legacy because new Supreme Leader's authority is constrained. Tasnim simultaneously ran 'IRGC Division Holds Anti-Heliborne War Game' — Special Operations counter-insertion drill = Iran preparing for US ground-raid posture that could follow if Sledgehammer ordered. **A5 RIAL REVERSED MAY 13 — 1,842K (May 12) → 1,817K (May 13) = -1.36% (Alanchand Hawala/Remittance series primary)** — FIRST material reversal in rial trajectory since May 6-10 stabilisation. Markets pricing Trump-Xi summit-pause + Vance softer + HEU-via-China easing imminent-collapse risk. 2M hyperinflation-trigger ETA pushed beyond May 22-24. **Caveat: Remittance ≠ Bonbast free-market series used as trigger baseline — tomorrow's pipeline re-anchor on Bonbast.** **A9 BLOOMBERG MAY 13: KHARG ISLAND OIL JETTIES EMPTY AGAIN — second satellite snapshot of empty jetties this cycle, operational confirmation of Iranian export collapse without kinetic premium** (Bloomberg primary). EIA separately confirmed (Bloomberg May 13): Hormuz oil flows fell nearly 30% in Q1 2026. **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 7 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** — IRGC drill's invocation of Ali (the father) rather than Mojtaba is structural signal that Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained. **B5 IRAN'S AMBASSADOR TO CHINA PUBLICLY FRAMED BEIJING AS 'POLITICAL BALANCING' PARTNER** (Tasnim primary + CBS News amplification) — institutional scaffolding being deliberately laid in Iranian state media for China-mediation arc, matching Trump's Beijing-day China-custodian door-opening. The diplomatic architecture pivot from Russia-track-stalled to China-track-opening is now visible from BOTH sides. Brent retraced from $108.05 (May 13 close, single-session breach) to $105.68 (May 14 morning) = $108-110 trigger zone breach was SINGLE-SESSION, NOT sustained — StanChart $130-145 cascade remains DORMANT. Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~20-25% (DOWN — clock close without strike + Vance softer + Trump China door-opening); extended-economic-warfare ~52-57% (UP modestly — Sledgehammer naming + IRGC exercise = bilateral kinetic-preparedness signaling continues); negotiated-resolution ~22-27% (UP — China-custodian path explicitly opened, ambassador-to-China scaffolding). PRIOR (May 13): IRAN STATE-MEDIA HARDENING ACROSS ALL CHANNELS: IRNA + Tasnim + Parliament's National Security/Foreign Policy Commission now publicly synchronised on a 'we will not bow / we will retaliate if struck again / weapons-grade is on the table' line — opposite of April's IRNA-vs-Tasnim divergence pattern. PARLIAMENTARY SPOKESPERSON REZAEI (NSFP Commission) PUBLICLY NAMED 90% ENRICHMENT AS RETALIATORY THRESHOLD IF IRAN IS STRUCK AGAIN (CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NOT ACTION) — first time in cycle a sitting Iranian parliamentary spokesperson has publicly named weapons-grade enrichment as a tripwire; current stated ceiling is 60% with ~440 kg stockpile, 90% line is the breakout threshold. Mehr News + Tabnak + Euronews + Iran International + Tasnim + Al Bawaba all amplified without editorial softening — Iranian state-media system permitted weapons-grade rhetoric as sanctioned policy signal, not a leaked outlier. Critically PARALLEL TO ECONOMIC ADMISSIONS: Deputy Labour Minister Mohammadi publicly confirmed >1 million direct job losses + 2 million unemployment-impacted from the war (NYT citing Jerusalem Post); Day 74 of comprehensive internet blackout. Iran is publicly admitting domestic economic deterioration WHILE publicly hardening on the nuclear file — classical regime-survival externalisation playbook now visible. **IRAN FM ARAGHCHI ARRIVES NEW DELHI MAY 13 FOR BRICS FM MEETING (May 14–15); MEETS MODI MAY 14 — SAME DAY TRUMP IN BEIJING (CONFIRMED — Iran Embassy New Delhi + India TV + Tribune India)** — Iran will sit at BRICS table with Chinese FM while Trump is in Xi's anteroom; India's most overt strategic-autonomy choreography of cycle.** **A5 RIAL TRAJECTORY RECALIBRATED — yesterday's brief listed 1,853,000 as May 12 print but ACTUAL CLOSE PRINT is 1,842,000 IRR/USD (+0.66% d/d, +12,000 IRR); revised 48h sequence is 1,799K → 1,830K (May 10) → 1,842K (May 12) = +2.4% over 72h (vs prior brief's +3.0% over 48h); 2M trigger ETA shifts modestly to May 22-24 if linear (vs May 19-21 prior). Canary still pointing same direction — accelerating — but slightly less aggressively than prior implied.** **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 6 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE post May 7 Pezeshkian meeting; NYT (citing four Iranian officials) reports serious injuries (multiple surgeries legs/arms, facial+lip burns affecting speech), aide rebuts ('perfect health... only fracture behind ear, slightly injured knee/back'); The National (Abu Dhabi) tilts toward injury narrative May 10. Institutional command without visible person remains stable equilibrium since Feb 28; trigger (video/audio appearance) HAS NOT FIRED.** **B4 IRAN MISSILE FIRE RATE COLLAPSED 92% from Feb-Mar peak per Jerusalem Post + CNN intel assessment (capability ≠ willingness ≠ logistics); 1,471 ballistic missiles fired Feb 28 – Apr 20; May 4-5 UAE small-scale was last meaningful kinetic response — nothing since. Capacity ceiling holding. Operational architecture of 'between a cold war and a hot war' (Sadjadpour) intact.** **A9 KHARG SLICK CONSOLIDATED VIA COPERNICUS: Al Jazeera + ynet + Jerusalem Post + Conflict and Environment Observatory now amplify Sentinel-1/-2/-3 imagery showing ~45 sq km west of Kharg (May 6-8); Iranian VP Shina Ansari publicly denied Iranian-facility origin, pins on 'foreign tanker dumping ballast water'; Fox May 11-12 second ~12-20 sq km slick is consistent with drift south rather than separate event = re-appearance trigger AMBIGUOUSLY ACTIVATED (drift ≠ re-appearance, ballast counter-claim not falsified); Western wires in slow-amplification mode on attribution.** **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED: Treasury signalled prepared secondary sanctions on five Chinese teapot refineries (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); China MOFCOM May 2 issued Prohibition Order under Blocking Rules — FIRST FORMAL CHINESE INVOCATION OF BLOCKING RULES vs US sanctions** (CONFIRMED Treasury + MOFCOM primary). The post-rejection landscape (post-Trump rejection May 11, post-Litani crossing May 12, post-Saudi-strikes disclosure May 12) has produced ZERO Iranian kinetic retaliation — no ballistic launches since May 4-5, no second Red Sea or Qatari EEZ strike, no Saudi/UAE response. The negative space IS the intelligence: 75 days into Hormuz blockade and 8 days into Project Freedom pause, Iran is not using the diplomatic-rejection shock as kinetic-escalation opening — consistent with reconstitution + parliamentary-rhetoric ladder rather than maritime-pressure playbook. Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~22-27% (DOWN modestly — Trump in Beijing forces 48h pause and Iran missile fire rate -92% caps near-term kinetic posture); extended-economic-warfare ~50-55% (UP — trinary regime + state-media synchronised hardening + rial accelerating + nuclear file escalation); negotiated-resolution ~18-23% (DOWN — Iran simultaneously synchronised hardening across all state media plus weapons-grade rhetoric makes near-term landing zone narrower).

active_triggers.condition: Mojtaba Khamenei appears on video/audio (proof of life and command)
Iranian rial breaks 2,000,000/USD black market (Brooks hyperinflation thesis confirmation)
active_triggers.note_2026-05-13: May 12 close 1,842,000 IRR/USD (+0.66% d/d, +2.4% over 72h). 2M ETA recalibrated to May 22-24 if linear (vs prior brief's May 19-21). Still on track, slower than implied by prior 48h read.
active_triggers.note_2026-05-14: FIRST MATERIAL REVERSAL — May 13 Alanchand Hawala/Remittance series at 1,817,000 IRR/USD (-1.36% from May 12 close 1,842K). 2M trigger ETA now pushed beyond May 22-24; at new pace a linear extrapolation no longer reaches 2M before late-May/early-June. Caveat: Hawala/Remittance series ≠ Bonbast free-market series — series can diverge 20-50K. Tomorrow re-anchor on Bonbast for trigger calibration. Reversal direction reading: markets pricing Trump-Xi summit pause + Vance softer + HEU-via-China door-opening as easing imminent-collapse risk.

active_triggers.condition: Iran resumes enrichment to weapons-grade levels (>20% U-235) publicly OR confirmed operational policy shift
active_triggers.note: Parliament NSFP Commission spokesperson Rezaei publicly named 90% enrichment as retaliatory threshold if Iran is struck again (CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NOT ACTION). Tasnim/IRNA/Tabnak/Mehr amplified without softening — sanctioned signal not leaked outlier. Trigger requires operational change to enrichment policy, not parliamentary rhetoric. Iran current stated ceiling 60% with ~440 kg stockpile.

active_triggers.condition: Iran's missile stockpile depleted to point of inability to sustain retaliation
Iran accepts direct talks with US (publicly acknowledged)
Iran retaliatory strike for Tangsiri assassination
Iran formally accepts/signs 14-point MOU with US (within 14 days = by 2026-05-21) — Nasr/Sadjadpour falsification test
Iran formal response within Trump's 1-week window (closes 2026-05-14)
active_triggers.note: RESOLVED 2026-05-12: Iran delivered formal multi-page written response via Pakistan May 10-11 (CONFIRMED ACTION); Trump publicly rejected as 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE / garbage' Truth Social May 10 evening + Oval Office May 11. The clock fired — Iran responded — but the response was rejected, so the channel did not collapse; framework now on 'massive life support' per Trump.

active_triggers.condition: Trump orders renewed strikes on Iran following 1-week clock close (post-May 14, post-Beijing return May 15-16)
active_triggers.note: Trump convened WH Sit-Room May 11 with Vance/Rubio/Hegseth/Ratcliffe/Caine/Witkoff; renewed military action explicitly under discussion; one official 'Trump is going to hit them a bit'; NO ORDERS ISSUED. Beijing trip May 14-15 forces pause window. Watch May 15-20 for any orders.

active_triggers.condition: Hormuz transit volume above 30 vessels/day for 3 consecutive days (operational reopening, vs current 5-6/day vs 138 norm)
active_triggers.note_2026-05-16: Aramco CEO Nasser cited ~30 vessels/day vs 140 pre-war on May 15. New operational signal: Iran allowed 30+ Chinese ships to transit since May 13 night under 'Iranian management protocols' (REPORTED) — so a portion of the ~30/day is Iran-permitted Chinese transit. Non-Iranian non-Chinese transit rate is likely *lower* than headline figure. Trigger remains `watching`; the selective-Chinese-transit is the OPPOSITE of a fully operational reopening.

active_triggers.condition: Iran formally accepts or rejects the May 16 Trump nuclear letter (full dismantling + 2-month compliance) within 30 days (by 2026-06-15)
active_triggers.note: Cleanest decision-tree input for the next 60 days. Sadjadpour falsifiable: if Iran formally accepts May 16 letter terms by 2026-07-16, multi-track-posture-as-leverage reading fails. Nasr falsifiable: if Trump signs framework with verification within 30 days (by 2026-06-15), structural-mismatch leg fails.

active_triggers.condition: Iran rial Bonbast vs Alanchand divergence persists beyond 5 sessions (source-quality flag)
active_triggers.note: May 15 divergence: Bonbast +0.61% reversal vs Alanchand -0.06% continued strengthening. If divergence persists 5+ sessions, either series is unreliable as trigger baseline — would force a methodology re-anchor.

recent_signals.headline: **IRAN'S DIPLOMATIC POSTURE REFINED INTO FIVE INTERNALLY-CONSISTENT INSTITUTIONAL PILLARS following Trump's immediate post-summit reversal + May 16 new nuclear ultimatum letter.** (1) FM Araghchi (Tasnim primary May 15): enrichment 'is currently not on the agenda of discussions or negotiations' but 'will be addressed in later stages' — cleanest tactical-defer framing of cycle, positioning enrichment as defer-to-later-phase item. (2) Khamenei advisor Ali Shamkhani: Iran ready to sign in exchange for quick removal of all financial sanctions but criticised Trump's rhetoric — cleanest Iranian conditional-acceptance signal, attached to Supreme Leader's office. (3) Pezeshkian 'never bow' continues. (4) Artesh-Akraminia 'surprising options' carries forward. (5) IRGC drill closed Day 5/5 with 'all objectives achieved.' Internally-consistent triangulation: maintain leverage, condition concessions on sanctions, defer the hardest item. **Iranian officials denied receiving any new US proposal and insisted Iran would not give up the right to enrich uranium.** No Iranian state-media outlet has carried Trump's 'decimation' Truth Social post through Saturday morning IST — Iran is choosing not to amplify Trump's inflammatory rhetoric, preserving its own diplomatic-conditional framing intact. **HORMUZ SELECTIVE REOPENING — Iran allowed 30+ Chinese ships to transit since May 13 night under 'Iranian management protocols'** (REPORTED — Fars/IRGC-Navy senior official; Iran state TV 'more than 30 ships'; Xinhua; Al Jazeera 'Trump, Xi discuss Strait of Hormuz as Chinese vessels transit key waterway'; CBS; Defense Post; Newsweek; Militarnyi; New Arab). Iran using selective transit as a diplomatic instrument rather than enforcing comprehensive blockade — consistent with selective-enforcement-under-PGSA-rules framing. **The Aramco benchmark ~30/day vs 140 pre-war is now partially explained: a portion of the ~30/day is Iran-permitted Chinese transit, so non-Iranian non-Chinese transit is likely *lower* than headline figure implies.** Defense Post and Newsweek noted Iran has occasionally allowed Chinese ships throughout the broader blockade because China is the largest buyer of Iranian oil. **A5 RIAL BONBAST May 15 = 1,822,000 IRR/USD (+0.61% from May 14), REVERSING the three-day Alanchand strengthening pattern**; the two series have diverged on May 15. Architecture trigger baseline is Bonbast free-market — directional read flips from 'gradually pricing summit-pause' to 'neutral-to-mildly-weakening pending operational outcome.' At Bonbast pace, 2M trigger ETA does not reach 2M before mid-June. Source-divergence is itself the signal — tomorrow needs reconciliation. **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 9 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** — May 13 a portrait of Mojtaba was carried at the national football team's farewell ceremony ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup (channelstv primary): a portrait, NOT the Supreme Leader himself. The CNN April 21 framing 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime to survive' continues to hold structurally. **A7 No fresh UKMTO advisory through May 16 morning** on Hui Chuan or Haj Ali; Iran has not commented on Hui Chuan; no attribution on Haj Ali. India MEA 'unacceptable' carries forward. Modi's UAE arrival statement 'We condemned the attacks on the UAE' = public Indian alignment vector. Brent retraced from $107.42 Thursday close to ~$106 Friday — paper-Brent absorbed Trump 'decimation' reversal as not-an-immediate-escalation but did not deflate. Markets-wise WTI booked +11% weekly gain to near $106 — cleanest week of physical-tightness reflection in cycle.
sources: Tasnim News Agency — Araghchi 'enrichment not on agenda of discussions or negotiations' (primary Iranian semi-official, IRGC-linked)
Wikipedia 2025-2026 Iran-US negotiations — Shamkhani response compilation (secondary)
Fars News (Iran semi-official, citing IRGC-Navy senior official) — primary on 30+ Chinese ships
Iran state TV — 'more than 30 ships' carrying-frame
Xinhua 'Iran begins letting some Chinese ships cross Strait of Hormuz' (Chinese state amplification)
Al Jazeera, CBS, Defense Post, Newsweek, Militarnyi, New Arab (Western/wire amplification)
Times of Israel May 15 liveblog (Trump 'decimation' Truth Social Iran-side context)
Detroit News May 15 (Trump 'didn't ask China for any favours')
Channels Television May 13 — Mojtaba portrait at football send-off (primary observational)
Press TV (Iran denial of receiving new US proposal)
recent_signals.verification: Araghchi 'enrichment not on agenda' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Tasnim primary); Shamkhani conditional acceptance = REPORTED (Wikipedia compilation, single-original Iranian press); Iran 30+ Chinese ships transit = REPORTED ACTION (original Fars-IRGC primary, amplified cascade — treat as Iranian state attribution); Trump 'decimation' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (ToI liveblog primary, US side); Iran non-amplification of Trump rhetoric = CONFIRMED ABSENCE (multi-source IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV scan); Bonbast 1,822K reversal = REPORTED (single-source Bonbast via search); Bonbast vs Alanchand divergence = REPORTED (cross-source divergence is itself the signal); Mojtaba portrait at football send-off = CONFIRMED observational (channelstv primary); Mojtaba Day 9 silence = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; UKMTO no fresh advisory = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; Iran denial of new US proposal = CONFIRMED RHETORIC.

recent_signals.headline: **TRUMP-XI JOINT STATEMENT NAMES IRAN BY POLICY: 'IRAN CAN NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON' + STRAIT OF HORMUZ 'MUST REMAIN OPEN'** (CONFIRMED — ToI May 15 liveblog primary, CBS, CNN, China MFA readout). **China MFA readout records 'China values Iran's pledge not to pursue nuclear weapons while affirming its legitimate right to the peaceful use of nuclear energy'** = Iran's right-to-civilian-program escape valve preserved in language. **Iran has NOT publicly welcomed the joint statement** — neither civilian nor military Iranian official acknowledged. **IRANIAN ARMY (ARTESH) SPOKESPERSON BRIG. GEN. MOHAMMAD AKRAMINIA WARNED IN IRNA INTERVIEW OF 'SURPRISING OPTIONS' IF ADVERSARIES MAKE ANOTHER 'MISCALCULATION'** — saying any future aggression would take the conflict into areas 'the enemy has not anticipated' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC, IRNA primary). Fresh kinetic-preparation rhetorical signal from a uniformed Iranian Army spokesperson — institutionally distinct from Pezeshkian's civilian framing and from IRGC drill signaling. Artesh and IRGC are institutionally separate; an Artesh spokesperson making 'surprising options' claim alongside an active IRGC drill is the cleanest signal yet of coordinated kinetic-readiness messaging across both Iranian military pillars exactly as the Trump-Xi joint statement was being issued. **IRGC 'MARTYRED COMMANDER' DRILL CLOSED DAY 5/5 WITH HASSANZADEH STATEMENT ALL OBJECTIVES ACHIEVED** (CONFIRMED — Mehr News + News.az primary): Brig. Gen. Hassan Hassanzadeh, commander IRGC Great Tehran Corps, confirmed all pre-rehearsed scenarios, individual combat techniques, and team tactics executed and evaluated during 5-day drill involving rapid reaction forces, special forces, IRGC and Basij commando units. Drill's invocation of LATE Ali Khamenei (codename 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei') rather than the new Supreme Leader Mojtaba is the institutional tell. Parallel 'Anti-Heliborne War Game' counter-Special-Operations-insertion drill maps directly to US ground-raid posture that would follow if Sledgehammer were ordered. **A5 RIAL THIRD CONSECUTIVE SESSION OF SLIGHT STRENGTHENING ON HAWALA/REMITTANCE SERIES**: 1,817K (May 13) → 1,811K (May 14) → 1,810K (May 15), totalling -0.39% from May 12 close 1,842K. The 2M-trigger ETA continues to push out — at new pace linear extrapolation no longer reaches 2M before mid-June. **Bonbast direct fetch failed this morning** (page returned site structure without numerical data); tomorrow re-attempt or accept Alanchand as operational benchmark. **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 8 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** post May 7 Pezeshkian meeting; Today's IRGC drill ended with codename invoking deceased Ali rather than the supposedly-active Mojtaba. **A8 SAUDI MFA TACIT ACKNOWLEDGMENT LANGUAGE: senior Saudi foreign ministry official, asked directly about covert strikes, did NOT address the question** — instead said: 'We reaffirm Saudi Arabia's consistent position advocating de-escalation, self-restraint and the reduction of tensions in pursuit of the stability, security and prosperity.' Closest thing to a tacit acknowledgment in any Saudi communication of the cycle. Iranian foreign ministry 'did not respond to a request for comment' per Reuters. **Reuters added timing detail: 'informal de-escalation took effect in the week before Washington and Tehran agreed to a ceasefire in their broader conflict on April 7'** — Saudi-Iran de-escalation predated broader US-Iran ceasefire by ~one week; Saudi exit from kinetic exchange may have been the leading edge of broader ceasefire architecture, a structural insight the graph should now encode. **B1 HUI CHUAN SEIZURE — UKMTO advisory May 14: Honduras-flagged vessel taken by 'unauthorised personnel whilst at anchor' 38nm NE of Fujairah, 'now bound for Iranian territorial waters'** (CONFIRMED on event; REPORTED on Iranian destination — UKMTO investigating). Iran has not claimed responsibility — consistent with prior pattern of operational ambiguity. Seizure occurred on same day Trump-Xi joint statement said Hormuz 'must remain open' — the simultaneity is the signal. **B2 MSV HAJ ALI SINKING + INDIA MEA 'UNACCEPTABLE' CONDEMNATION**: Indian-flagged dhow ~175ft, carrying livestock from Berbera Somalia to Sharjah UAE, was rocked by 'major explosion' possibly from drone or missile early May 13 and subsequently sank off Oman coast. All 14 crew rescued by Omani Coast Guard. India MEA: 'India reiterates that targeting commercial shipping and endangering innocent civilian crew members, or otherwise impeding freedom of navigation and commerce, should be avoided' (CONFIRMED India MEA primary). Iran has not claimed; CLAIMED on attribution. **The attack occurred while New Delhi was hosting Iranian FM Araghchi for the BRICS Foreign Ministers' Meeting and Modi met Araghchi May 14 — same day Modi's UAE visit was finalised. Two India-bound LPG tankers crossed Hormuz over past 48 hours per the Modi government** (operational confirmation Indian energy flows still moving but with elevated risk).

recent_signals.headline: DAY 76 OF HORMUZ BLOCKADE / TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK CLOSES TODAY (Day 7/7) WITHOUT STRIKE ORDER — forced-pause-via-Beijing hypothesis OPERATIONALLY VALIDATED through clock close. **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 1 — TRUMP PUBLICLY OPENED HEU-VIA-CHINA CUSTODIAN DOOR**: 'only Washington or Beijing can retrieve Iran's nuclear material if Tehran agrees to hand it over' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary). Material policy signal: contradicts pre-departure 'doesn't need Xi' line, substitutes China for Russia as proposed HEU custodian (US officials reportedly ruled out Russia-as-custodian per multiple May reports). Xi opened with 'partners rather than rivals' / 'Thucydides Trap' / wants 2026 'landmark year' — language designed to lower temperature. Xi has NOT publicly accepted any custodian role; framework remains stalled on substance (Iran's HEU return-clause demand and Trump's text-light approach unchanged). **VP VANCE MAY 13 PUBLICLY SAID US NEGOTIATORS 'STILL MAKING PROGRESS' WITH IRAN DESPITE 'UNSATISFYING RESPONSES'** (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Haaretz May 13, The Hill, CNN). Softer line than Trump's pre-departure 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE / massive life support' framing — cleanest publicly-visible US-internal-administration tone divergence of cycle: Trump pre-Beijing harder, Vance softer. **PENTAGON 'OPERATION SLEDGEHAMMER' CONTINGENCY NAMING** (REPORTED — NBC News May 12 primary; JPost, Mediaite, Yahoo, WION, ZeroHedge secondary) — White House officials told NBC: any new military combat operations would be conducted under a new name and operation; 'Sledgehammer is not the only name under consideration.' Structural significance: renaming operation would allow administration to argue Sledgehammer is structurally separate from Operation Epic Fury (Feb 28 onward), thereby restarting 60-day War Powers Act clock requiring Congressional authorisation. Leak surfaced PRE-summit — telegraphs to Tehran that post-summit kinetic option is being administratively pre-staged. NO Iranian-state-media response (IRNA/Tasnim/Press TV did not engage Sledgehammer naming — consistent with pattern of focusing on posture not US bureaucratic mechanics). **A11 IRAN FM ARAGHCHI ARRIVED NEW DELHI MAY 13; MET MODI MAY 14 AT BRICS-FM TABLE** (CONFIRMED — Iran Embassy New Delhi + ANI + Tribune India + India TV + Free Press Journal + NewKerala). Modi receives Araghchi in joint call-on with all BRICS visiting FMs May 14 at 1pm IST from Sewa Teerth. Choreography: Iran's FM sitting at BRICS table (with Chinese FM Wang Yi via BRICS framework) on the day Trump is in Beijing managing Iran with Xi face-to-face, and three days before Modi flies to UAE. **MAJOR NEW SIGNAL: ARAGHCHI USED DELHI PLATFORM TO DIRECTLY THREATEN UAE** — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog: 'Iranian FM threatens UAE, claims Tehran knew of Netanyahu's visit to Abu Dhabi' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC). India therefore receiving an Iranian FM who publicly threatens India's other Gulf strategic partner from Indian soil. UAE has not publicly responded; Indian press has not editorialised (Republic / Times Now / Zee continue UAE-tour-as-energy-security framing without engaging Araghchi's UAE threat). Modi's UAE visit May 15 now choreographically loaded — India strategic-autonomy-as-multi-vector-channel framing operationally tested in next 48 hours. **A12 IRGC LAUNCHED 5-DAY 'MARTYRED COMMANDER' / 'LABBAYK YA KHAMENEI' COMBAT EXERCISE AROUND TEHRAN (May 12-onwards)** (CONFIRMED ACTION — Mehr News primary, Press TV, Tasnim, Islam Times, Pars Today, WION, News.az). Mohammad Rasulullah Division (Tehran Corps) under Brig. Gen. Hassan Hassanzadeh: 'enhancing combat ability to counter any hostile move by the American-Zionist enemy.' Codename invokes the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father), NOT supposedly-active new Supreme Leader = institutional imagery leaning on Ali's legacy because Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained. Tasnim simultaneously ran 'IRGC Division Holds Anti-Heliborne War Game' (May 13) — Special Operations counter-insertion drill suggests Iran preparing for US ground-raid posture that could follow if Sledgehammer ordered. Cleanest single operational confirmation that Iran's military is preparing for a restart scenario, even as political track continues. Pentagon Sledgehammer naming is the structurally matched US-side preparation. **A5 RIAL REVERSED MAY 13 — 1,842K (May 12) → 1,817K (May 13) Hawala/Remittance series = -1.36% over 24h** (Alanchand primary). FIRST material reversal in rial trajectory since May 6-10 stabilisation. Revised 96h sequence: 1,799K (May 10) → 1,830K (May 11) → 1,842K (May 12) → 1,817K (May 13). 2M trigger ETA pushed beyond May 22-24 — at new pace a linear extrapolation no longer reaches 2M before late-May/early-June. Caveat: Hawala/Remittance ≠ Bonbast free-market series (May 12's 1,842K used Bonbast/Alanchand close); two series can diverge 20-50K on any given day. **A9 BLOOMBERG MAY 13: KHARG ISLAND OIL JETTIES EMPTY AGAIN — second satellite snapshot of empty jetties this cycle** = operational corroboration of Iran's export-throughput collapse; consistent with both Iran-blames-tanker-waste line AND Western-experts-suggest-storage-overflow line. The National (Abu Dhabi) sober analytical piece May 13 explicitly NOT attributing to Iran — Gulf-press editorial caution maintained. **A6 MOJTABA DAY 7 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** — IRGC drill's invocation of Ali (father) rather than Mojtaba reinforces Sadjadpour's 'regime decapitated at the senior level' framing. **B5 IRAN'S AMBASSADOR TO CHINA PUBLICLY FRAMED BEIJING AS 'POLITICAL BALANCING' PARTNER** (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Tasnim primary + CBS News amplification): 'long-term cooperation with China provides Iran with strategic diplomatic depth as it seeks an end to the war in the face of American pressure'; 'China is not merely an economic partner but part of Iran's political balancing against external threats'; 'China had paved the way for previous direct U.S.-Iran peace talks in Islamabad'; 'predicted Beijing could emerge as a key player in ongoing diplomacy.' Publicly-sanctioned Iranian state-media-side scaffolding for China-mediation arc — institutional ground being prepared from Tehran's side for exactly the kind of HEU-via-China structure Trump opened in Beijing. Diplomatic architecture pivot from Russia-track-stalled to China-track-opening is now visible from BOTH sides, even though no operational announcement has been made. **A8 NEGATIVE-SPACE CHAIN: Day 3 of 7 since May 11 Hodeidah unclaimed explosion (no 2nd Red Sea); Day 4 of 7 since May 10 Safesea Neha bulk-carrier strike inside Qatari EEZ (no 2nd strike); Day 9 of Project Freedom pause; Day 15 of 21 Russia-HEU-custodian window with NO formal announcement; Day 7 Mojtaba silence; CENTCOM redirect tally unchanged at 61; no 5th disabled Iranian-flagged tanker.** Net post-Trump-rejection + post-Litani + post-Saudi-strikes-disclosure: ZERO Iranian kinetic retaliation. Pezeshkian 'we will never bow / negotiation does not mean surrender' continues. Velayati 'we defeated you on the battlefield' jab carries forward.

recent_signals.headline: DAY 75 OF HORMUZ BLOCKADE / TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 6/7 (closes May 14) — TRUMP DEPARTED FOR BEIJING DECLARING 'DOES NOT NEED XI'S HELP ON IRAN' / US WILL WIN 'ONE WAY OR THE OTHER' (CONFIRMED, pre-departure South Lawn) — pre-Beijing posture materially HARDER than May 6–10 pulse-test phase that floated cooperation language on Chinese leverage on Tehran. Al Jazeera + NPR led with 'doesn't need Xi'; PBS NewsHour + CSIS framed both leaders as 'intent on keeping Iran war from overshadowing summit' — itself a downgrade from prior weekend's Chatham House 'can progress be made on Iran' framing. **IRAN STATE-MEDIA HARDENING ACROSS ALL CHANNELS — IRNA + Tasnim + Parliament NSFP Commission now publicly synchronised on 'we will not bow / we will retaliate if struck again / weapons-grade is on the table' line (HARDENING vs April's IRNA-vs-Tasnim divergence pattern).** PARLIAMENTARY SPOKESPERSON EBRAHIM REZAEI (NSFP Commission) MAY 12: '90 percent enrichment may be one of Iran's available options if the country is subjected to another attack' — FIRST TIME IN CYCLE a sitting Iranian parliamentary spokesperson has publicly named weapons-grade enrichment as a retaliatory threshold (CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NOT ACTION — conditional on future attack, not an order or operational policy change). Current stated ceiling is 60% with ~440 kg stockpile; 90% line is breakout-to-bomb threshold. Amplified by Mehr News (Iranian state), Tabnak (Iranian state), Euronews, Iran International (opposition-leaning, factual on quote), Tasnim (IRGC-linked), Al Bawaba — no editorial softening = Iranian state-media system permitted weapons-grade rhetoric as sanctioned policy signal. Tasnim ran on-record source: 'No one in Iran drafts plans to please Trump' — directly rejecting US 'garbage' framing. IRNA carried Pezeshkian's continued 'talks are not surrender' line. **DEPUTY LABOUR MINISTER MOHAMMADI CONFIRMED >1 MILLION DIRECT JOB LOSSES + 2 MILLION UNEMPLOYMENT-IMPACTED FROM THE WAR** (NYT citing Jerusalem Post) + Day 74 of comprehensive internet blackout. Iran publicly admitting domestic economic deterioration WHILE publicly hardening on nuclear file = classical regime-survival externalisation playbook now visible. **IRAN FM ARAGHCHI ARRIVES NEW DELHI MAY 13 FOR BRICS FM MEETING (May 14-15); MEETS MODI MAY 14 — SAME DAY TRUMP IN BEIJING** (CONFIRMED — Iran Embassy New Delhi + India TV + Tribune India + ChinaPulse + Open The Magazine). India holds 2026 BRICS presidency. Modi receives Iranian FM on the very day Trump is in Beijing trying — by his own departure-day language — to manage Iran without Chinese mediation; one day before Modi himself flies to UAE (now a confirmed third combatant per WSJ + Newsweek). BRICS agenda 'regional stability, multilateral cooperation, economic resilience' = code for India offering Iran non-aligned channel that is not Trump-led process. Most overt Indian strategic-autonomy choreography of cycle. Araghchi will sit at BRICS table with Chinese FM — China-Iran direct alignment WHILE Trump is in Beijing. **A5 RIAL TRAJECTORY RECALIBRATED — May 12 CLOSE PRINT IS 1,842,000 IRR/USD (+0.66% d/d, +12,000 IRR)** vs yesterday's brief's 1,853,000 (likely intraday quote). Revised 48h sequence: 1,799K → 1,830K (May 10) → 1,842K (May 12) = +2.4% over 72h. 2M trigger ETA shifts modestly to May 22-24 if linear (vs prior May 19-21). Canary still pointing same direction — accelerating — but slightly less aggressively. **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 6 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE post May 7 Pezeshkian meeting. NYT (citing 4 Iranian officials): serious injuries (multiple surgeries legs/arms, facial+lip burns affecting speech). Iranian aide rebuts ('perfect health... only fracture behind ear, slightly injured knee/back'). The National (Abu Dhabi) tilts toward injury narrative May 10. Institutional command without visible person remains stable equilibrium since Feb 28; trigger HAS NOT FIRED.** **B4 IRAN MISSILE FIRE RATE COLLAPSED 92% from Feb-Mar peak** (Jerusalem Post + CNN intel assessment). Feb 28 - Apr 20: 1,471 ballistic missiles fired at Israel/Jordan/Qatar/Kuwait/Bahrain/Saudi/UAE/Oman/Turkey. May 4-5 UAE small-scale was last meaningful kinetic response; nothing since. Capacity ceiling holding — capability ≠ willingness ≠ logistics; 'between a cold war and a hot war' architecture intact (Sadjadpour). **A9 KHARG SLICK CONSOLIDATED: Copernicus Sentinel-1/-2/-3 imagery now amplified by Al Jazeera + ynet + Jerusalem Post + Conflict and Environment Observatory — ~45 sq km west of Kharg, May 6-8 detection. Iranian VP Shina Ansari publicly denied Iranian-facility origin: 'foreign tanker dumping ballast water.' Fox May 11-12 ~12-20 sq km second slick is consistent with drift south rather than separate origin event — re-appearance trigger AMBIGUOUSLY ACTIVATED (drift ≠ re-appearance, ballast counter-claim not formally falsified). Western wires in slow-amplification mode on attribution.** **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED — Treasury signalled prepared secondary sanctions on five Chinese teapot refineries (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); China MOFCOM May 2 issued Prohibition Order under Blocking Rules — FIRST FORMAL CHINESE INVOCATION OF BLOCKING RULES vs US sanctions** (CONFIRMED Treasury + MOFCOM primary; Holland & Knight + Baker McKenzie independently corroborate). Trump arrives Beijing day after — Chinese have public legal ground prepared. **A10 NEWSWEEK (citing WSJ + 2 Western officials + 2 Iranian officials): SAUDI ARABIA LAUNCHED SECRET STRIKES AGAINST IRAN IN LATE MARCH** ('tit-for-tat retaliation when Saudi was hit') — on top of yesterday's UAE-Lavan WSJ disclosure (April 8 Mirage 2000-9). Iran has fired >2,800 missiles/drones at UAE territory cumulatively — MORE THAN AT ANY OTHER COUNTRY — Iran's prior 'punishment of US-aligned host' framing against UAE now confirmed retaliation against fully kinetic third combatant. One UAE Lavan-response strike reportedly coordinated with Israel. Saudi/Iran silent; Al Hadath (Saudi) editorial distance on UAE story but not Saudi-strikes. The Gulf-alignment graph requires Saudi to move from 'OPEC+/balancing/underwriter' toward partial kinetic participant — structural re-encoding. Net: ZERO Iranian kinetic retaliation post-Trump-rejection + post-Litani + post-Saudi-strikes-disclosure — consistent with reconstitution + parliamentary-rhetoric ladder, not maritime-pressure playbook. Negative-space remains the operative intelligence.

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 5/7 — IRAN FORMALLY RESPONDED VIA PAKISTAN MAY 10-11 + TRUMP PUBLICLY REJECTED (Truth Social 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE' / Oval Office 'massive life support' / 'garbage' / '1% chance of living' doctor analogy); IRAN 14-POINT TERMS DISCLOSED — FIRST HEU CONCESSION OF CYCLE (dilute portion under IAEA + transfer remainder to third country) BUT WITH EXPLICIT RETURN CLAUSE if US exits any future deal (REPORTED — WSJ primary); Trump convened White House Situation Room May 11 with Vance/Rubio/Hegseth/Ratcliffe/Caine/Witkoff considering renewed military action (restart Project Freedom or strike 'remaining 25%' of designated Iran targets) — one official: 'Trump is going to hit them a bit' (NO ORDERS ISSUED — REPORTED via Axios); Trump China visit CONFIRMED May 14-15 (Trump departs May 13 afternoon for Beijing summit with Xi, Iran on agenda) creates FORCED PAUSE WINDOW exactly when 1-week clock closes May 14; Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes aired May 11: war 'not over' until uranium removed + enrichment sites dismantled + proxies neutralized — 'you go in and you take it out'; Mojtaba 'alive but in bunker' (Netanyahu) — US + Israeli intel converge; **RIAL ACCELERATING APPROACH TO 2M TRIGGER**: 1,799K May 10 → 1,830K May 11 → 1,853K May 12 (+3.0% over 48h, +1.26% d/d); at current pace 2M would hit by May 19-21 if linear; official rate 1,311,203 = ~41% gap (CONFIRMED — AlanChand + Bonbast 1405/02/22 metadata); SECOND KHARG SLICK DETECTED MAY 11-12 (~12-20 sq km, smaller than May 6-8 45-65 sq km but persistence elevates storage-overflow hypothesis vs European-tanker-waste counter-claim); HOUTHI DAY 80 RED SEA QUIET POSSIBLY BROKEN MAY 11 — UKMTO confirmed explosions near vessel 130km SW of Hodeidah (NO CLAIM — non-claim itself a signal); Hezbollah killed IDF reservist WO Alexander Glovanyov May 10 near Manara (announced May 11) = 5TH IDF SOLDIER KILLED post-April 16 ceasefire all by FPV/explosive drones — SOLDIER not CIVILIAN, May 10 civilian-trigger UNTRIPPED HOLDS; May 12 SAM fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft (CGTN single-source); IDF struck 30+ Lebanon locations May 11 + first Beirut southern-suburb strike since April 16 ceasefire; Lebanese Health Ministry ≥23 killed in 24h, cumulative war toll 2,869; Knesset extended reservist authority to May 31; IDF Chief Zamir warned 12,000 additional recruits needed (mostly combat troops); NEW OFAC SANCTIONS WAVE MAY 11-12 — 12 entities (4 HK, 4 UAE, 1 Oman) + 3 individuals for IRGC Shaid Purja'fari + Golden Globe Turkey-cover company facilitating Iran→China oil; WSJ MAY 11: UAE SECRETLY STRUCK IRAN'S LAVAN ISLAND REFINERY APRIL 8 using Mirage 2000-9 aircraft (55,000 bpd offline months) — reframes Iran's prior UAE-targeted strikes as direct retaliation against confirmed third combatant; UAE silent on WSJ exposure; CENTCOM tally 58→61 redirected (3 in 48h — below early-May pace, Project Freedom paused); Aramco CEO Nasser May 11: Hormuz transit 2-5 ships/day (vs ~6/day May 10), 100M bbl/week lost, 880M cumulative, market won't normalize until 2027 if disruption persists past mid-June; VLCC Agios Fanourios I (Iraqi Basra crude bound Vietnam) reversed course back into Gulf of Oman without crossing US blockade line — confidence-collapse signature even for compliant non-Iranian VLCCs; HMM Namu forensics public May 11 — Seoul stopped short of publicly blaming Iran (mine + torpedo ruled out; 2 unidentified aerial objects ~1min apart at stern) creating diplomatic friction with Trump; Vessel attribution of May 10 Doha strike clarified: Marshall Islands-flagged Safesea Neha, US-managed by Safesea Group (NJ); 2nd Safesea vessel hit this cycle (Safesea Vishnu March 12 Iraqi waters); Pravda attribution to two Iranian UAVs UNCONFIRMED by Western forensics; Modi May 10-11 Hyderabad address — seven appeals incl. defer gold purchases / cut fertilizer 50% / defer foreign travel — first major Indian-government public engagement of cycle; Modi 5-nation tour May 15-20 (UAE-Netherlands-Sweden-Norway-Italy). Iran tone hardening: Tasnim's Velayati Trump-Xi summit-timed jab ('We defeated you on the battlefield; never think you will emerge victorious in diplomacy'); IRNA carried Army spokesperson Akraminia 'surprising options' warning — military signaling through civilian outlet = establishment unified; Pezeshkian May 12 'resistance and protecting honor'; FM Baghaei 'legitimate' and 'reasonable' demands; Press TV 'talks are not surrender.'

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 3/7; TRUMP SOFTENED FROM 'FRIDAY SHOULD RESPOND' TO 'NO DEADLINE / WE'LL SEE WHAT HAPPENS' (UPDATED — material US public-posture softening); CENTCOM PRECISION TALLY 58 REDIRECTED + 4 DISABLED SINCE APRIL 13 (UPDATED — refines yesterday's >70-tankers-held framing); BULK CARRIER STRUCK 23NM NE OF DOHA SUNDAY MORNING (NEW — first commercial vessel attack since CMA CGM May 5, FIRST near Qatar's coast, NO claim of responsibility); KHARG ISLAND SATELLITE-CONFIRMED OIL SLICK (NEW — first hard-data signal blockade biting at production-export interface; cause CONTESTED — Iran blames European tanker waste, Fox-quoted experts suggest storage-overflow dumping); BAHRAIN DETAINED 41 ALLEGED IRGC-LINKED INDIVIDUALS (NEW — first major Gulf-state internal action against alleged IRGC network); UAE AIR-DEFENSE SCALE REFINED (UPDATED — 2 ballistic + 3 drones, 3 wounded May 8); HEZBOLLAH-IDF DAY 14 KINETIC CONTINUED (IDF 85+ targets, 12 killed S Lebanon, 7 in Saksakiyeh; Hezbollah drones wounded 3 IDF reservists; trigger UNTRIPPED Day 14/14 ceiling intact); IRGC STRIKE ON PDKI GIRDE CHAL KURDISH CAMP (second Kurdish-camp strike in 5 days); RIAL MODEST REVERSAL 1,812K → 1,803K → 1,799K (CONFIRMED — AlanChand); MOKHBER 'ATOMIC-BOMB' HORMUZ DOCTRINE unchanged; PEZESHKIAN-MOJTABA 2.5HR MEETING CLAIM 48 HOURS WITHOUT STATE-MEDIA CORROBORATION — silence is the signal. Tasnim continues semi-official 'Iran forced criminal America to accept its 10-point plan' counter-narrative for domestic audiences (CLAIMED). FM Baghaei pushed back against Trump's 'love tap' framing as 'naive euphemisms.' Iranian diaspora protests planned in 30+ cities globally Sunday May 10 (REPORTED — first major coordinated diaspora mobilization since cycle began).
sources: Times of Israel May 9-10 live blogs

Meron drone reach acknowledged at MILITARY-target only — trigger UNTRIPPED Day 14/14; PDKI Girde Chal strike = REPORTED (FDD/Hengaw single-side); Rial 1,799,000 IRR/USD = CONFIRMED (AlanChand); Pezeshkian-Mojtaba meeting CLAIMED 48 hours, NO state-media corroboration = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; Iranian diaspora protests Sunday = REPORTED (planning, actual turnout pending)

recent_signals.headline: TRINARY REGIME HARDENING — TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK NOW DAY 2/7; SOFT FRIDAY DEADLINE PASSED WITHOUT FORMAL IRANIAN RESPONSE; CENTCOM DISCLOSED 70-TANKER BLOCKADE SCALE + SECOND DAY OF TANKER STRIKES (M/T SEA STAR III + M/T SEVDA, MAY 8); MOKHBER 'ATOMIC-BOMB' HORMUZ SPEECH; PEZESHKIAN CLAIMED 2.5-HOUR FACE-TO-FACE WITH MOJTABA (CLAIMED); ZERO HORMUZ TRANSITS MAY 7 + 1,500 VESSELS ANCHORED. Rubio said Iran 'should' respond Friday May 8; Trump said expected response 'Friday night' but 'we'll see what happens'; no formal Iranian response filed by Friday close. Baghaei (FM) reiterated 'still considering proposal,' will relay 'to Pakistani mediators when complete.' Tasnim (IRGC channel) called US text 'unacceptable clauses,' propaganda 'aimed at justifying Trump's retreat.' Trump Truth Social May 8 evening: 'we'll knock them out a lot harder, and a lot more violently, in the future, if they don't get their Deal signed, FAST.' Mokhber (adviser to supreme leader, described as Mojtaba's adviser in Pakistani/Iranian press): 'Strait of Hormuz represents an opportunity as precious as an atomic bomb'; pledged Iran 'will change the [legal] regime of this strait — through international law if possible, and unilaterally if not' — first leadership-adjacent voice publicly endorsing unilateral codification of selective Hormuz control as permanent strategic asset. Pezeshkian on state TV claimed 2.5-hour 'completely unmediated' meeting with Mojtaba; provided no date, location, witnesses, readout, or visual evidence; CNN/KVIA same day reported US intel assessment that Mojtaba is alive 'shaping strategy' but 'out of public view.' US Navy F/A-18 from USS George H.W. Bush disabled M/T Sea Star III and M/T Sevda May 8 (precision-munition tactic, same as M/T Hasna May 7); CENTCOM disclosed 70+ tankers held under blockade and 20 warships, 200 aircraft, 15,000 troops enforcing — 'fully in effect.' Iran claimed counter-seizure of unidentified tanker in Gulf of Oman. Iranian regional official said May 7 strikes wounded 10 sailors, 5 missing (single-side). Lloyd's List confirmed ZERO Hormuz transits May 7 (down from 7 May 6), 1,500 vessels anchored in Persian Gulf. Trump publicly thanked Pakistan civilian and military leadership for mediation; revealed Pakistan 'asked the US not to militarily engage Iran during negotiations.' Rial weakened to 1,812,000 IRR/USD remittance May 8 (vs 1,775,000 May 7) — yesterday's appreciation chirp silenced. Sadjadpour: 'extending into a one-week stall pattern; alive but operationally indistinguishable from a slow-roll.'
recent_signals.verification: Trump 1-week clock + Friday soft-deadline pulse-test = CONFIRMED multi-source; Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' speech = CONFIRMED RHETORIC/THREAT (institutional, multi-source primary); Pezeshkian-Mojtaba 2.5-hour meeting = CLAIMED (statement CONFIRMED multi-source; meeting unverified — no date/location/witnesses/visual); US intel 'Mojtaba shaping strategy out of public view' = REPORTED (CNN/KVIA citing US intel community assessment); CENTCOM tanker disabling May 8 + 70-tanker blockade scale = CONFIRMED ACTION (CENTCOM primary, multi-source); Iran tanker counter-seizure = CONFIRMED action (Iran-side single-source on identity, action multi-source); Iran casualty figures (10 wounded, 5 missing) = REPORTED single-side; civilian-area allegations = CLAIMED (no independent corroboration); Trump-Pakistan diplomatic-constraint disclosure = CONFIRMED RHETORIC/SIGNAL (Trump primary, Pakistan Today multi-source); Hormuz zero transits + 1,500 vessels = CONFIRMED OPERATIONAL FACT (Lloyd's List + CNN); Rial 1,812,000 IRR/USD = CONFIRMED (AlanChand)

recent_signals.headline: MOU FRAMEWORK CIRCULATING — 14-POINT MEMORANDUM-OF-UNDERSTANDING DRAFTED WITH 48-HOUR IRAN RESPONSE WINDOW. Provisions: end-of-war declaration, 12-15 yr Iran enrichment moratorium (compromise from 20yr-US/5yr-Iran), Iran ships out HEU stockpile (custodian TBD), US lifts sanctions and frozen assets, BOTH sides lift Hormuz blockades, 30-day post-signing detail window. MOU originally Iran's proposal (response to 9-point US plan via Tasnim May 3). Witkoff+Kushner negotiating directly + via Pakistani mediators. **Iran posture bifurcated:** Baqaei (FM): 'assessing,' 'lasting peace top priority' (conciliatory civilian); Tasnim (IRGC-aligned): 'more wishlist than reality' (hardline-leverage, no escalation call); Press TV: 'Project Freedom perishes... Iran's asymmetric deterrence' (triumphalist victory framing — historically precedes deal acceptance). Trump warned 'bombing starts at significantly higher level and intensity' if no deal. Iran also signaled FIRST EXPLICIT REOPENING OFFER for Hormuz: 'reopen if US lifts blockade and war ends' (PBS/AP/Al Jazeera/IRGC Navy 'safe transit with new procedures'). [CORRECTION 2026-05-08: prior version of this signal stated 'FM Araghchi arrives India May 7-8 for 20th Joint Commission with Jaishankar+Murmu (75th anniversary India-Iran Friendship Treaty) — parallel-track diplomacy.' That JCM occurred in May 2025 — year-stale-source error caught post-publication.] CMA CGM San Antonio struck May 5 by cruise missile (CBS attribution to Iran, IRGC has NOT claimed) — kinetic-tail risk persists despite diplomatic-track pricing. Mojtaba Day 60-61 absent; AI-generated videos confirmed by TIME — supreme-leader vacuum is structural reason for Pezeshkian-IRGC factional split.
recent_signals.verification: MOU drafting = REPORTED (Axios scoop multi-corroborated, final text not published); Iran-Hormuz reopening offer = REPORTED→CONFIRMED (PBS/AP direct quotes, IRGC Navy spokesperson statement); Hormuz still operationally closed (5-6 vessels/day vs 138 norm — CONFIRMED via Strauss Center/Lloyd's List); Iran factional bifurcation = CONFIRMED (Baqaei vs Tasnim vs Press TV multi-outlet); Araghchi India visit = CONFIRMED (MEA primary); CMA CGM strike = CONFIRMED action, CLAIMED Iran attribution (single-source US officials via CBS, no Iranian claim, no independent corroboration); Mojtaba AI-generated videos = REPORTED (TIME single-source, Iran International corroborated, Iranian state has not denied)
